reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
처음 출시됐을 때부터 지금까지 몇 L를 쓰고 있는지 모르겠어요ㅎㅎ 
그만큼 너무 만족하고 있는 제품이에요
강한 향으로 냄새를 덮는 다른 탈취제랑 달리 프레시미는 아무 향도 안 나는데 배변 냄새를 싹 없애줘요!
그래서 사람한테도 강아지들한테도 너무 좋은 것 같아요
특히 부모님이 엄청 좋아하셔서 떨어질 때쯤 미리 쟁여두라고 먼저 말씀하셔요ㅋㅋㅋ
그러니 제발 단종없이 평생 쭈욱 판매해주세요🥺🤍
reviews.content_en: I've lost count of how many liters I've gone through since it first came out lol 😂 That's how satisfied I am with this product! Unlike other deodorizers that mask odors with strong fragrances, FRESH ME has no scent at all but completely eliminates poop smell! So it's great for both people and dogs. My parents especially love it so much that they tell me to stock up before we run out lol! So please, please keep selling this forever without discontinuing it 🥺🤍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 믿고사는 프레시미! 첨써보고 신세계영접후 재주문했어요 정말 냄새잡아주기도하고 무향이라 오히려 저는 더 맘에 들어요 수시로 돌돌이 침대,담요, 배변패드 근처에 뿌려주는데 안좋은 냄새를 싹 없애주는 마법같은 효과! 언능 경험해보셔유 신세계 그 이상일거에요 놓치쥐않을꼬에요!!!!
reviews.content_en: FRESH ME—I trust it! First time using it was a whole new world, and I reordered right away. It really tackles odors and since it's unscented, I actually love it even more! I spray it regularly around Dolly's bed, blankets, and near the pee pads, and it has this magical effect of completely eliminating bad smells! You have to try it ASAP—it's beyond amazing. You won't regret it!!!!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
장난감은 주기적으로 세탁해주는데 쇼파 관리가 힘들 것 같아서 구매했어요. 
매일 뿌리니까 찝찝하지 않고 상쾌해요! 
가끔 배변 실수하는데 그때도 마무리로 뿌려줍니다. 
무향이라서 후각에 예민한 강아지에게도 좋을 것 같아요. 
넘 만족해서 리필만 따로 추가구매합니다! 
구매한지 1달도 안됐는데 거의 다 써가요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I wash toys regularly, but managing the sofa seemed tough, so I got this. Since I spray it daily, everything feels fresh and not icky! Sometimes he has accidents, and I use this as the finishing touch. Since it's unscented, it seems great for dogs with sensitive noses too. I'm so satisfied that I'm buying refills separately! It's only been a month since I bought it and I'm almost out lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감 구매 하면서 100원 이벤트 하길래 구매해봤어요 ! 지금까지 썻던 타 소취제들은 항상 향이 들어가서 마음에 안 들었어요 향수냄새같이 독한 향이 톡 쏘기도 하고 시간이 지나면 남아있는 잔향이 너무 별로였거든요 특히 아이들이 물고빨고하는 장난감에 뿌릴때 뭔가 그 찝찝함 ㅠ 바잇미 소취제를 뿌려 보고 후회했어요 진작 살 껄 하면서요 일단 향은 약간 소독향 ? 느낌 인데 시간이 지나면 아무냄새가 안나요 저희 집은 배변패드가 제 방 입구쪽에있어요 매일 아침 눈 떠서 문 열면 톡 쏘는 그 냄시 ^_^ 계절 안 가리고 강아지 쉬야냄시 엄청 코를 찌르자나요 이 소취제 한번이면 냄새 다 날라가요 완전 좋아요 ㅠㅠ 다 쓰면 대량으로 구매할거에요 적게 일하고 많이 버세요 !!!!!! 😏
reviews.content_en: I picked this up during a 100 won event when I was buying toys! I never liked other deodorizers I've tried because they always had fragrance—those strong perfume-like smells that sting and leave lingering scents that are just awful. Especially when spraying on toys that kids chew and suck on, it felt so icky 😭 So I tried BITE ME's deodorizer and I regretted not buying it sooner! The scent is kind of like a slight disinfectant smell, but after a while there's no smell at all. Our pee pads are right by my room entrance, and every morning when I wake up and open the door, I get hit with that sharp pee smell 😭 Year-round, dog pee has such a pungent odor, right? One spray of this deodorizer and all the smell is gone. It's amazing 😭 When I finish this, I'm buying in bulk. Work less, earn more!!!!!!! 😏

reviews.name: 올****
reviews.content: 프레시미 사용전에 아주 많은 탈취제품을 거쳐갔지만 이것만큼 확실하고 완벽하게 댕댕찌릉내 잡아주는 제품은 없었습니다.칙칙 뿌리고 슥 닦으면 보통 냄새가 남아있거나 탈취제에 가미된 인공 화학약품의 진한 향냄새가 코를 찔렀죠. 하지만 이제 그런 향으로 인해 머리아프고 스트레스 받을 필요 없어요!! 이 살균 소취제 하나면 댕댕 소변자리, 소변방울 튄자리, 응아싼자리 등등 냄새에서 완벽하게 해방될 수 있어요. 냄새를 냄새로 덮는 것이 아닌, 냄새분자를 잡아 없에버리는 아주 확실한 방법! 프레시미 밖에 없어요. 본품과 리필 세트 구매하여 사용한 후 재구매를 했답니다. 용량도 넉넉해서 막 뿌려도 오래사용하더라구요. 이것저것 시도하고 코버리고 돈버리지 마시고 프레시미 하세여! 최고의 살균소취제 입니다.
reviews.content_en: Before using FRESH ME, I went through so many deodorizers, but none were as effective and perfect at eliminating doggy odors. Spray and wipe, and usually there's lingering smell or that strong artificial chemical scent that stings your nose. But now I don't have to deal with headaches and stress from those fragrances!! With just this sterilizing deodorizer, you can be completely free from odors—dog pee spots, pee splatter, poop spots, everything! Not masking odor with odor, but actually capturing and eliminating odor molecules—it's such a sure method! Only FRESH ME does this. I bought the full size and refill set, used them, and reordered. The capacity is generous so even if you spray generously, it lasts a long time. Don't try this and that, don't cover your nose, don't waste money—just go with FRESH ME! It's the best sterilizing deodorizer.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 아니 진짜 좋아요.... 이미 패드에 쉬 해논데 위에도 뿌려봣는데 냄새가 안나요..... 모지? 1+1해서 친구랑 한개씩 나눳는데.. 그냥 이벵트 그끛나기 전에 더 쟁일래요.. 바잇미 인정각^^
reviews.content_en: Seriously, it's so good.... Even though the pad already has pee on it, I sprayed it on top and there's no smell..... What?? My friend and I split a 1+1 deal, but I'm gonna buy more before this event ends.. BITE ME approved^^

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content:
강아지가 가끔 배변 실수를 하기도 하고, 장난감이나 옷에 뿌려주려고 구매했어요 ~
다른 소취제 많이 써봤는데 제가 맡아도 독한 향, 강아지가 뿌릴 때 마다 기침을 하는 그런 소취제도 있었는데 이건 저도 강아지도 자극적이지 않아서 좋아요 용량도 커서 맘에 들어용 ~~
다 쓰면 재구매할게요 ^.^
reviews.content_en: My dog sometimes has bathroom accidents, and I got this to spray on toys and clothes~ I've tried lots of other deodorizers, but some have such a strong smell even I find it overpowering, and my dog coughs every time I spray them. This one isn't irritating for me or my dog, so I love it~ And the size is big, so I'm happy with it~~ I'll reorder when I run out ^.^

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 좋아요. .청소를해도 화장실 및 배변판에서 그래도 쉬야 냄새가 나는데 청소후 뿌리고 나면 획실히 냄새가 안나요. .
reviews.content_en: Good. Even after cleaning, the bathroom and pee pads still smell like pee, but after I spray this after cleaning, the smell is definitely gone.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저번에 500ml 사용해보고 좋아서 리필도 구매했어요~ 타사 제품보다 좀더 상쾌하고 깨끗해지는 느낌이 있어요~ 재구매의향 100%있는 제품입니다!
reviews.content_en: I used the 500ml before and liked it, so I bought a refill too~ It feels fresher and cleaner than other brands~ This is a 100% repurchase product for me!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아요 이전 탈취제는 냄새가 나다보니 오히려 더 실수를 하더라구여 ㅠㅠㅋㅋㅋ 싸고 치우면 거기서 향이나는걸 알고 난 이후부터 였을까요 .. 살균에 무향이라 저희도 냄새가 독하지않고 좋아서 리필용도 살까 싶습니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so good! With my previous deodorizer that had scent, he actually had more accidents 😭😂😂 Once he learned that smell means that spot, that's when it started happening... Since this one is sterilizing and unscented, the smell isn't strong for us either and we like it, so I'm thinking of buying refills too hehe

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 탈취제가 필요해서 바잇미라 믿고주문했는데 너무 좋은거같아요! 향도 인위적인 향이 아니라 무향에 가까운 향이라 깔끔해요 재구매 의사 완전 있습니다 ( •͈ᴗ•͈)◞ ෆ⃛
reviews.content_en: I ordered BITE ME because I needed a deodorizer, and it's so good! The scent isn't artificial at all—it's almost unscented, which is really clean and refreshing. I'm definitely repurchasing! ( •͈ᴗ•͈)◞ ෆ⃛

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 둘째를 데려오고 난 후 배변실수가 잦아 꼭 필요하더라구요. 작은 용량이여도 오래쓰겠지 했는데 처음부터 리필용 함께 구매할 껄 그랬어요ㅎㅎ 변 냄새 싹 잡아주니깐 너무 좋아요! 장마철이라 환기도 오래 못시켜서 걱정이였는데 큰 용량 구매해놔서 마음이 든든해요
reviews.content_en: After bringing home our second pet, accidents became frequent, so this really came in handy. I thought even the small size would last a while, but I wish I'd bought the refill pack from the start haha. It completely eliminates poop odor, so I'm really happy with it! It's been rainy season so I couldn't ventilate much, which was worrying, but having the larger size stocked gives me so much peace of mind.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이것만 쓴지 몇년… 
사람 것도 이것만 써요
reviews.content_en: I've been using only this for years... My family uses it too!

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content: 냄새가 강하지 않고 좋네요. 다른거 쓸 때 너무 냄새가 독해서 애기가 싫어했어요. 이건 안그래요~!
reviews.content_en: The scent isn't strong and smells nice. When I used other products, the smell was too overpowering and my baby didn't like it. This one isn't like that at all~!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 향도 없는데 살균 소취가 잘 되는게 정말 신기하네요. 좀 더 안전한거 같고 믿음이 갑니다.
reviews.content_en: It's amazing that it sanitizes and deodorizes so well without any scent at all. It feels safer somehow and I really trust it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 고양이들 화장실 부지런하게 치워도 나오는 그 냄새는 어쩔수가없어서 구매했어요~~ 안뿌리는것보다는 훨씬 좋네요 ㅎㅎ 고양이들한테 향이 좋지 않다고해서 열심히 찾아보다가 샀어요
reviews.content_en: Even though I clean my cats' litter box diligently, that smell still comes through, so I had to get this~~ It's so much better than not using anything! I searched hard for something that wouldn't have a scent that's bad for cats, and that's how I found this.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 기존에 쓰던 탈취제 제품은 천연미생물이용했다고해서 구매했었는데 특유의냄새가 나중에 나서 좀 힘들었거든요 그런데 바잇미의 프레시미는 냄새없이 정말 깨끗하게 살균 탈취가 되는것같아서 왕만족!! 제동생 돌돌이도 흐뭇해하는 레어템입니다요!!
reviews.content_en: I bought another deodorizer brand before because it claimed to use natural microbes, but it had a weird smell that came out later and was tough to deal with. But BITE ME's FRESHME deodorizes and sanitizes so cleanly without any scent at all—I'm super satisfied!! My brother's Dodol also loves it—it's a rare gem!!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 너무 좋은거같아요! 진짜 오줌냄새때문에 스트레스 받았었는데 확실히 냄새를 잡아주는것같아 신기하고 그러네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I think it's really great! I was honestly stressed out about the urine smell, but it definitely eliminates the odor, which is amazing haha.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: n년째 사용중인데 떨어지기전에 쟁입니다. 다견가정이라 사용량이 많은데 세일 제품구매해서 가격 혜택 받아 좋네요. 여러개 사서 여기저기 두고 사용합니다.
reviews.content_en: I've been using this for years and always buy it again before it runs out. We have multiple dogs so we go through a lot, and I got a good deal on the sale price. I buy several bottles and keep them in different places around the house.

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 후기보고구매했어요, 배변패드, 인형.이불등등 뿌리면 냄새없어지는것같ㅇㅏ요. 다음에 재구매할께요
reviews.content_en: I bought it after reading reviews, and the smell disappears when I spray it on pee pads, stuffed animals, blankets, etc. I'll definitely repurchase next time!

reviews.name: 꼉****
reviews.content:
오오...왜 이제야 산걸까요??항상 바잇미 이용하면서 그냥 보기만 했지 살 생각을 못 했는데 진짜 좋네요!!
원래 타제품만 거의 4년째 사용하다가 요번에 한번 바꿔보자는 생각으로 바잇미 프레시미 살균 소취제를 구매해봤어요!
바꾸고자 한 계기는 일단 펌핑용기가 제가 하도 많이 써서 그런건지 모르겠지만 2,3달에 한번 꼴로 리필이 아니라 본품도 늘 재구매를 하데 만들정도로 잔고장이 심하더라구요ㅠㅠ 그리고 살균제라 오래 사용하다 보니 특유의 살균지 냄새도 안맡고 싶고 해서 바꿔봤어요
근데 확실히 아직 오래 사용은 안했지만 펌핑하면 소취제가 진짜 잘 나오고 손도 안아파요!!!또 젤 중요한 냄새!!! 소독약 냄새도 안나서 저 정말이지 행복 그자체 
울 댕댕이 장난감에 뿌려줄때도 타제품은 좀 살균제가 쎈가 싶어 뿌리고 마르면 물에 헹궈서 주고 했는데 이건 그냥 마르면 바로 줄 정도로 무향이라 좋네요
한가지 더 좋은 점은 진짜 이사오고 영역표시 할려는지 여기저기 오줌을 싸다가 냄새가 안빠지는지 유독 바닥 한군데서 계속 실수를 하더라구요ㅠㅠ 근데 바잇미 이 제품 열시미 뿌려서 닦고 또 닦고 했더니 이제 실수하는 그 자리에서는 오줌을 안누더라구요 우연인지 일단 제 스트레스가 줄었다는거에 의미를 두는걸로...ㅎㅎ
리필까지 같이 사서 한두달은 걱정없이 쓸거 같아요!!:)
reviews.content_en: Oh wow... why didn't I buy this sooner?? I always used BITE ME but just looked at it without thinking to buy it, but it's really great!! I'd been using another brand for almost 4 years, but this time I decided to try switching and got the BITE ME Freshme sterilizing deodorizer! The reason I wanted to switch was that the pump dispenser had so many problems—whether from me using it a lot or not, I had to rebuy the full bottle instead of just refills every 2-3 months 😭 And since it's a sterilizer, I didn't want to smell that distinctive sterilizing smell anymore, so I switched. But even though I haven't used it for long yet, when I pump it, the deodorizer really comes out well and it doesn't hurt my hands!!! And most importantly the smell!!! There's no disinfectant smell, so I'm literally happy 😊 When I spray it on my pup's toys, with other products I was worried the sterilizer was too strong so I'd spray and rinse it with water after drying, but this one is so unscented I can just give it right away after it dries. One more great thing—right after we moved, my dog kept having accidents in one spot like he was marking territory, and the smell wouldn't go away so he kept making mistakes in that same spot 😭 But I sprayed this BITE ME product on it generously and wiped and wiped, and now he doesn't pee in that spot anymore! Whether it's coincidence or not, my stress definitely went down 😄 I bought a refill too so I'll be worry-free for a couple months!! :)

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
강아지를 처음 키우게 되었는데 처음에는 어려서, 요즘은 개춘기라 자꾸 배변 실수를 하더라고요ㅠㅠ

그냥 그때그때 이 브랜드, 저 브랜드 제품 구입하여 쓰고 있었는데 향이 들어간 제품 쓰다보니 별로라 무향으로 찾고 있었어요

신규회원 이벤트로 저렴하게 구입했기도 하고 유용하게 잘 써서 아주 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I just got my first dog, and at first he was young, but these days he's going through that doggy teenage phase and keeps having accidents 😭 I was just buying products from different brands as needed, but when I used scented products I wasn't satisfied, so I was looking for something unscented. I bought it cheaply with a new member event discount and I'm very satisfied since I've been using it well!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아직 배변훈련이 잘 안된 3개월 새끼강아지가 있어서 유용하게 쓰입니다.
하루에 한두번씩 배변패드가 아닌 곳에 실수를 하면 
재빠르게 닦아내고 뿌려주면 효과가 좋아요.
용량도 크고 새끼강아지가 무는 인형이나 배변패드가 주 대상이다보니
유해물질과 계면활성제가 없다는 점이 일단 좋습니다.
제일 강점은 냄새가 없다는 점!
대용량 리필액도 팔아서 다 쓰면 리필만 살수 있는 점도 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I have a 3-month-old puppy who's still not fully housetrained, so this is really useful. When he has an accident outside the pad once or twice a day, I quickly wipe it up and spray it, and it works great. The bottle is a big size and since puppies mainly chew on toys and pee pads, the fact that there are no harmful substances or surfactants is great. The best part is that it's unscented! And they also sell large refill bottles, so once you use it up you can just buy the refill, which is nice.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
기존에 쓰던건 향이 나서 저도 거부할정도라  꾸역꾸역쓰다 다쓰고  요거 좋다길래 구매했어요 향이 없다는거에 너무 좋구여 분사력에 감탄합니다 👍 한번에 쫙 퍼지는 분사력 정말좋아여  강아지 고양이 키우느라 냄새에 신경을 많이쓰는데 냄새잘잡아주네여🤗
 강아지장난감에도 한번 뿌려주고  쿠션에도 뿌려주고 신납니다 👍👍
reviews.content_en: The one I used before had a strong scent that even I didn't like, so I reluctantly used it until it ran out, and then I heard this one was good so I bought it. I'm so happy there's no scent 👍 I'm amazed at the spray power—it really spreads in one shot, so good! I'm careful about smells since I have dogs and cats, and this one really gets rid of the odor 🤗 I spray it on my dog's toys, on cushions too, and I'm so satisfied 👍👍

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
바잇미프레시미스프레이
냄새를 맡아보니 아주 미묘하게 병원소독향이 납니다
투명하면서 뿌리기 편하고요
무자극이라 구매했어요^^
우리 보리양이 아토피가 심해요
가끔 심해지면 피부가 코끼리피부마냥 뒤집어지고
여기저기 번지면서 찐덕임 냄새 ..가 심해져요
며칠전에도 검사받고 피부연고 피부가루약 안압약 
싹다 처방받아오고 지금 가라 앉았거든요
가끔 한번 심하게 피부가 뒤집어져서 늘 손이 많이가고 잘 챙겨줘야 되요~
이게 살균력 소취력도 좋고 무자극이라 더좋고^^
우리보리는 일반강아지들보다 균에 대한 그런 면역력이
떨어지는 아이고 균검사할때도 나쁜균이 세배이상 많은 아이라면서 평생 약 먹여야 한대요 거즌 10년 먹여왔어요 1살 안됫을때 데려왔거든요 ^^ 10살입니다 ㅎㅎ
그래서 폭신하고 이쁜쿠션 그런거 사주지도 못하고
힝..
그런게 피부에 안좋다고해서 얇은거 자주 빨수 있는거 깔아주고 있어요
이거 이불이나 장난감에 뿌려주고 산책 갔다와서
씻기고 말리고 연고바르고 눈약 넣어주고
밥먹이고 가루약 먹이고 치카하고 ~맙소사 ^^;;
네 저는 집사 입니다^^
잘 케어 해줘야 피부가 안정이 되고 늘 손이 많이 갔는데
이거 뿌리고 먼가 산뜻해졌어~집사님들 다 아시겠지만 그..특유의 냄새들이 있거든요 ~^^
이거 좋네요~추천합니다 
잘산거 같아요^^
reviews.content_en: BITE ME Freshme spray—when I smelled it, it has a very subtle hospital disinfectant scent. It's transparent and easy to spray, and I bought it because it's non-irritating ^^ Our Bori has severe atopy. Sometimes when it flares up, her skin gets all thick and cracked like elephant skin, and that funky smell spreads everywhere and gets really bad. Just a few days ago we had a checkup and got prescribed skin ointment, skin powder, and eye drops, and now it's calmed down. Sometimes her skin gets really bad and requires a lot of care and attention ～ This has good sterilizing and deodorizing power and is non-irritating which is even better ^^ Bori has weaker immunity to bacteria than regular dogs, and when they did the bacterial test they said she had more than three times the bad bacteria, so they said she'd need to be on medication for life. We've been doing that for 10 years—I got her when she was under 1 year old ^^ She's 10 now ㅎㅎ So I can't even buy her soft, pretty cushions... 😞 Since those aren't good for her skin, I put down thin ones that I can wash frequently instead. I spray this on her blankets and toys, come back from walks, bathe her, dry her, apply ointment, put in eye drops, feed her, give her powder medicine, brush her teeth ~ my goodness ^^ Yes, I'm a cat lady ^^ If I care for her well her skin stabilizes and she needs a lot of attention, but after spraying this something feels fresher～ You fellow pet parents probably know... there are those distinctive smells ～^^ This is good～I recommend it! Seems like a good purchase ^^

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
요번에 탈취제 똑떨어져서 구매했어요
항상 사용하지만 넘 좋아요 무향이고 향없는게 
젤 좋은 장점이에요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ran out of deodorizer this time so I bought it. I always use it but love it—the unscented part is the best advantage ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 소취제 중 이 상품이 좋았던게 리필용이 있어서 좋았고 분사력도 괜찮아서 좋았어용ㅎ
reviews.content_en: This product was good among deodorizers because there's a refill option and the spray power is decent ㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저렴하구 배송두 빠르게 왔어요 길냥이밥인데 젤큰거 사니까 맘이든든합니다 길냥이들 최애사료에요^^
reviews.content_en: It's cheap and the delivery came fast! Since I got the biggest size for the stray cats' food, I feel reassured. It's the favorite food for the strays ^^

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
맨날 응가 쉬 잘못해서 구매했습니다. 살균도 된다하여 여기저기 사용중인데 냄새 머리아프지도 않고 맘에 듭니다. 특히 강아지가 냄새 조금만 나면 코 비비고 비닥에 몸비비고 싫어서 그런지 난리나는데 이거뿌릴때는
가만히 있는거 보니 괜찮은가 봅니다🥲🩵
reviews.content_en: My dog keeps having accidents, so I bought this. Since it also sterilizes, I'm using it in different spots and it doesn't give me a headache from the smell—I like it. Especially since my dog gets upset with even a little smell, starts sniffing and rubbing on the floor, but when I spray this he just stays still, so it must be okay 🥲🩵

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
샤워타올과 H형 하네스 사면서 샀어요.
신규가입자 100원이라면서 3000원 택배비를 받으면 뭐가 100원 이벤트인지...
암튼 무향이네요.그건 좋군요.
집에 바우젠전해수기도 있지만 락스네 뭐네 해서 안쓴지 몇년째. 초기에 사서 30만원주고 산건데..ㅠㅜ아무래도 중3아들은 이미 다 크고 포메2분을 의지하고 살아서인지 얘네한테 안좋은건 절대 안하게 되더라구요. 믿고 쓰게될지는 모르겠네요
reviews.content_en: I bought it together with a shower towel and an H-shaped harness. They said it was a new member event for 100 won, but they charged 3000 won for shipping—what kind of 100 won event is that... Anyway, it's unscented, which is good. I have a Bauzens electrolyzed water machine at home but haven't used it for years with all the bleach talk—I bought it early on for 300,000 won 😭 But since my middle schooler is already grown and I have two Pomeranians I rely on, I just don't do anything bad for them anymore. I'm not sure if I'll trust using this though.

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 믿고 쓰는 프레시미💛 전에 신규가입 100원 구입 혜택때 구입 후 또또 구입했지뭐람ㅋㅋ 반려동물 키우시는 모든 분들의 효자템으로 꼽힐 수 있는 소취제! 보통 소취제에 대해서 모르시는 분들은 냄새 잡겠다고 페*** 주로 사용 하실꺼에요.. 제가 그랬거든요! 타 쇼핑몰에서 만들어진 화장실 탈취제 같은 경우에는 향기가 나서.. 화장실 냄새랑 섞이면서 악취가 심해지곤 했는데 바잇미 신규가입해서 써본 후로 무향 탈취제들로만 사용하고 있어요~ 무엇보다 바잇미 주방세제 구입하러 들어왔다가 1+1 하길래 두고두고 쓰고자 구입했지뭐람! 아, 그리고 리필도 있더라구요. 플라스틱 줄이기 위해서 담에 구입할때는 리필을 구입 해야겠어욤🙂
reviews.content_en: I trust FRESHME and keep buying it! 💛 I first bought it during the new member sign-up discount for 100 won, and then I just kept buying it again and again lol. This deodorizer is the go-to product for all pet owners! Most people who don't know much about deodorizers usually use air fresheners to mask the smell... I was like that too! With bathroom deodorizers from other shopping malls, they have strong fragrances, and when mixed with bathroom odors, it made things worse. But after signing up for BITE ME and trying it, I've only been using fragrance-free deodorizers~ Plus, I came to buy BITE ME dish soap and saw they had a 1+1 deal, so I bought extra to use for a while! Oh, and they have refills too. Next time I buy, I'm getting the refill to reduce plastic waste 🙂

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
무향이라 좋아요
쉬야한 장소에 뿌리기도 좋고
강아지 방석 장난감 등 살균할때도
너무 편하게 쓰고 있습니다 ㅎㅎ
리필 넣어서 새거처럼 쓰는중인데
본제품의 스티커가 조금 부실한 느낌이 ㅜ
reviews.content_en: I love that it's fragrance-free! It's great for spraying in places where my dog goes, and it's so convenient to use for disinfecting the dog's bed, toys, etc. hehe I'm using it like new by refilling it, but the sticker on the main product feels a bit flimsy ㅜ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: *강쥐 소변 주의* 강아지가 배변 실수하는 경우에 냄새가 베일 수도 있다고 해서 구입했습니다. 화려한 향이 있는 제품이 싫어서 구매했는데 배변 치우면서 소변 냄새를 체감한 적이 없는걸 보면 탈취효과는 확실한 것 같아요! 강아지에게도 무해하다고 하니 강아지가 다가와도 크게 막을 필요없어서 사용하는데도 편리하고, 기울여서 사용하는데도 분사력이 괜찮아요. 용량이나 그립감도 적당해서 추천합니다.
reviews.content_en: *Dog pee warning* My dog had an accident with bathroom training, and I heard the smell could linger, so I bought this. I didn't like products with fancy fragrances, so I got this one, and I've never noticed urine smell while cleaning up after her—the deodorizing effect is definitely there! Since it's said to be harmless to dogs, I don't need to worry even if she comes near it, which makes it convenient to use. The spray pressure is good even when tilted, and the capacity and grip feel just right. I recommend it!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
8개월 비숑 덴탈껌이랑 유산균 구매했어요! 
퍼피시기땐 이빨이 약해서 너무 단단한 덴탈껌은 좋지않다고해서 찾아보다 성분도 좋아 구매했어요 
입이 까다로와서 1봉지만 구매했는데 너무 잘먹어요 
아직 잡고 먹는법을 몰라서 처음엔 잡아줘야하는데 ~ 엄청 잘먹어요
유산균도 밥을잘 안먹어서 밥위에 뿌려주려고 샀어요 
냄새는 요쿠르트 냄새구요 처음에 가루만 손바닥위에 올려줘봤는데 아주잘먹네요 ! 밥위에 뿌려주면 밥그릇 뿌실정도로 핥아먹어요 ! 
100원 주고 구매한 탈취제도 장남감에 뿌려도 된다해서 믿고쓰고있습니더 
재구매 예정 입니다 !!
reviews.content_en: I bought dental chews and probiotics for my 8-month-old Bichon! During the puppy phase, her teeth are weak, so I was told hard dental chews aren't good, so I looked around and bought this because the ingredients are good. My pup is picky about food, so I only bought one pack, but she eats it so well! At first, she doesn't know how to hold it yet, so I have to hold it for her~ but she eats so well! I bought the probiotics because she doesn't eat her regular food well, so I sprinkle it on her food. It smells like yogurt, and at first I just put some powder on my palm and she ate it right up! When I sprinkle it on her food, she licks the food bowl clean! I also confidently use the 100 won deodorizer I bought on her toys, and I'm planning to repurchase!!

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 냥이 화장실에 하루 한 번씩 뿌려주려고 샀는데 유통기한이 짧아요. 그래서 할인하나봐요. 제조로부터 1년인데 리필 제품 6개월 남은거 보냈더군요. 바닥 청소할 때 사용하고 냥이 물품에도 뿌려줘야겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I bought it to spray in my cat's litter box once a day, but the expiration date is short. I guess that's why it's discounted. From manufacture date it's 1 year, but the refill product came with only 6 months left. I'll use it when cleaning the floor and spray it on my cat's items too.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리똥냥이 모래저렴히알아보다가 요기알게되어들어왔어요. 
100원이벤트로 100원에구매하여사용하였어요
모래.탈취.소독 다가능합니다 !!! 무향에 신기하게 뿌리면 
락스비슷한? 향이나는거같아요. 기존사용하던 메디록스랑비슷한느낌이나서 좋았습니다. 하루몃번씩뿌리다보니 벌써다사용해가네요. 
재구매 의향있습니다. 모델은 우리 꼬미^^ 
4냥이가있어서 막쓰기도 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: While looking for affordable cat litter, I found this place. I bought it for 100 won during the 100 won event and used it. It works for litter, deodorizing, and disinfecting all at once!!! It's fragrance-free, and strangely when I spray it, it smells like bleach? It felt similar to the Mediox I used to use, so I liked it. I've been spraying it several times a day and I'm already running out. I'm interested in repurchasing. The model is our little one ^^ It's good to use freely since we have 4 cats.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
행사하는 제품으로 샀어요. 
바잇미 소취제 꾸준히 써 오고 있어서
퀄리티야 뭐 말 할 것도 없네용! 
케이스도 깔끔하고, 소취 효과도 좋아요. 
강아지 용품에도 사용하고 있어요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it on sale. I've been consistently using BITE ME deodorizer, so the quality speaks for itself! The case looks clean and the deodorizing effect is great. I'm also using it on my dog's items lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아직 8개월 아까랑 장난감을 이것저것 정신없이 많이 꺼내 가지고 노는데 매번 세척하기 어려웠어요. 특히 패브릭은 세탁해도  세제가 잘 헹궈졌는지, 제대로 건조된건지 찝찝했죠 ㅜㅡㅜ  고민중에 프레시미를 알게됐고 행사로 저렴하게 구입하게 되었습니다. 행사가격 저렴해 유통기간 임박인가 했는데, 기간 넉넉하구요,  용량도 넉넉해서 마음껏 쓰겠어요 ㅎㅎ  제품 설명 자세히 읽어보고 믿음이 생겼습니다. 안심하고 즐겁게 소독 해볼게요 ^-^♡
reviews.content_en: My 8-month-old baby and toys are out everywhere and it was hard to clean them each time. Especially with fabric items—even after washing, I was unsure if the detergent rinsed out properly or if it dried correctly ㅜㅡㅜ While I was thinking about this, I found out about FRESHME and bought it on sale for cheap. I wondered if the sale price meant the expiration date was close, but it's actually got plenty of time left, and there's plenty of quantity too, so I'll use it generously hehe I read the product description carefully and it gave me confidence. I'll disinfect with peace of mind and joy ^-^♡

reviews.name: 세****
reviews.content:
좋아요ㅠㅠ 깔끔하고 분사도잘되고
냄새제거에 탁월합니다
배송도 빠르고 포장도 잘되서왔어요 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: Good ㅠㅠ It's clean, the spray works well, and it's excellent at removing odors. Shipping was fast and packaging was good too, thanks!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 쓰던게 다써가서 재구매했어요 진짜  이거만한  탈취제가 없어요  향도없어서  ,애들걱정에 무향찾다가 산거였는데  탈취효과도 좋습니다 진짜 극심한 냄새가 아닌이상  잡아주네요 🤗저희집은   쭉 이걸로 달릴예정입니다
reviews.content_en: My old one ran out so I'm reordering. There's really no deodorizer like this one. It has no fragrance, so I bought it because I was looking for fragrance-free options for the kids, and the deodorizing effect is really good. It handles pretty much any smell unless it's extremely strong 🤗 Our household is planning to stick with this one!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
무취인줄 모르고 코로나걸려서 냄새못맡는줄 알았어요ㅋㅋ
배변패드에 쉬야조준 잘못해서 바닥에 묻을때 잘 닦아도 킁킁
냄새맡아서 탈취제 뭐사야하나 엄청 알아봤는데 슬링백 구매할때 100원 이벤트로 택했는데 너무 좋아요 다쓰면 리필도 사려해요 통은 애기가 깨버려서 다른 분무기통에 담아서 스티커...다시 붙였어요^^
reviews.content_en: I didn't know it was odorless and thought I couldn't smell because I had COVID 😂 When my puppy misses the pad and pees on the floor, even after cleaning it well, I can still smell it. I looked into deodorizers a lot, and when I bought a sling bag, I picked this as a 100 won event item and I absolutely love it! I'm planning to buy refills once I use it up. The bottle got broken by my kid so I transferred it to a different spray bottle and re-stuck the sticker ^^

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
믿고 강아지용품 이부자리에
사용중입니다 향도없고 순하고안전한거같아서
너무좋아요~!! ㅎㅎ
여행갈때도 필수입니다 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I trust and use this on my puppy's bedding. It has no scent, it's mild and seems safe, so I really love it~!! ㅎㅎ It's a must-have when traveling too ㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 살균소취제 사용 후 적당히 사용할 수 있는 제품이라 재구매 했어요 생각보다 양도 넉넉해서 오래서용할 수 았네요
reviews.content_en: After using a sterilizing deodorizer, I repurchased this because it's a product you can use moderately. The quantity is also more generous than expected, so I can use it for a long time.

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
집에서는 탈취제만 있는걸 사용했는데 이건 탈취효과 +소독제 효능도 있다고해서 배송오자마자 바로 패드닦고 대청소했네요
강아지용이라 안심하고 써도 될거같아요 다쓰면 구매하러 또오겠습니다 번창하세유
reviews.content_en: At home I only used regular deodorizer, but since this has both deodorizing and disinfectant benefits, I cleaned the pads and did a thorough cleaning as soon as it arrived. Since it's for dogs, I feel safe using it. I'll be back to buy more once I run out. Wishing you success!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
분사력도 좋고 디자인도 이쁘고 살균 소취 잘돼서 넘좋아요
다쓰면 계속 바잇미꺼만 구매해서 사용하려합니다
reviews.content_en: The spray is powerful, the design is pretty, and the sterilizing and deodorizing work great, so I'm really happy with it. Once I finish it, I plan to keep buying and using only BITE ME products.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 무색무취 소변냄새 제거도 잘 되고 용량도 많아서 용기에 담아잘 사용하고 있어요.
reviews.content_en: It's colorless and odorless, removes urine smell really well, and comes in a large quantity so I'm using it well in a container.

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지가 소변을 잘 가려서 탈취제 쓸일이 많지는 않은데 조굼 남아있던게 다 떨어져서 살까말까하다가 구입햇어요
디자인이 넘 귀엽고 소변 살짝 흘린데 뿌리니 냄새제거 잘되네요
reviews.content_en: My puppy is usually good about going in the right place so I don't use deodorizer much, but the little bit I had left ran out so I was thinking whether or not to buy more. I ended up purchasing it. The design is so cute and when I sprayed it on a spot where my puppy leaked a little, it removed the smell really well.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
아이들 배변판 소독하기도 너무 좋고  장남 감이나 아이들 방석에 사용 할수 있어서  너무  젛은거  같아요~  
살균소독이 너무 잘되는거 같고  냄새 제거에도 효과가 젛은 거  같아요
reviews.content_en: It's so good for disinfecting the kids' pee pads and I can use it on the oldest son's mat and the kids' cushions too, so I think it's really great~ The sterilization and disinfection seem to work really well and it's also very effective at removing odors.

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
리필도 구매할 수 있길래 사봤어요
무향이라 너무 좋고 성분도 안전해서 안심이네용
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I could also purchase refills. It's great that it's fragrance-free and the ingredients are safe, so I feel reassured.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 구번째 구매입니다 ~  탈취제가 거기서 거기일거같아 청소만 잘하면 된다싶었는데 댕댕이 두마리에 고양이하나  대가족이다보니 .. 눈길이 안갈수가 없더라구요  눈으로보고 고민만하다 사서 써봤는데 여기꺼는 좋다는게 확실히 느꼈어요  한번쓰다 안쓰니까 생각나네요 냄새를 잡아준다는걸 알았습니다 아가들화장실청소때 잘쓰고있어요 👍👍👍
reviews.content_en: This is my 5th purchase~ I thought deodorizers were all the same and that cleaning was all that mattered, but with two dogs and one cat, we're a big household so I couldn't help but notice this product. I just looked at it and thought about it for a while before buying and trying it, and I definitely felt this one works better. Once I stopped using it, I started missing it and realized it really does control odors. I use it well when cleaning the kids' bathroom 👍👍👍
